import Mathlib.Algebra.Ring.Associated

namespace Submission

theorem Associated.neg_neg : ∀ {M : Type _} [Monoid M] [HasDistribNeg M] {a b : M} (h : Associated a b), Associated (-a) (-b) := by
  exact _root_.Associated.neg_neg

end Submission

task.statement:

  sorry
task.type_expr: ∀ {M : Type _} [Monoid M] [HasDistribNeg M] {a b : M} (h : Associated a b), Associated (-a) (-b)

proof.script:
import Mathlib.Algebra.Ring.AddAut

namespace Submission

theorem AddAut.mulRight_symm_apply : ∀ {R : Type _} [Semiring R] (u : Rˣ) (x : R), (AddEquiv.symm (AddAut.mulRight u)) x = x * ↑u⁻¹ := by
  exact _root_.AddAut.mulRight_symm_apply

end Submission

task.statement:
theorem AddAut.mulRight_symm_apply : ∀ {R : Type _} [Semiring R] (u : Rˣ) (x : R), (AddEquiv.symm (AddAut.mulRight u)) x = x * ↑u⁻¹ := by
  sorry
task.type_expr: ∀ {R : Type _} [Semiring R] (u : Rˣ) (x : R), (AddEquiv.symm (AddAut.mulRight u)) x = x * ↑u⁻¹

  exact _root_.AddAut.mulRight_apply

end Submission

task.statement:

proof.script:
import Mathlib.Algebra.Ring.Associator

namespace Submission

theorem associator_apply : ∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] (x y z : R), associator x y z = x * y * z - x * (y * z) := by
  exact _root_.associator_apply

end Submission

task.statement:
theorem associator_apply : ∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] (x y z : R), associator x y z = x * y * z - x * (y * z) := by
  sorry
task.type_expr: ∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] (x y z : R), associator x y z = x * y * z - x * (y * z)
